focus: ATR D4 formally elevated (0.825, 11th D4 SI). BIC DC#3 confirmed — NCLB K-12 regulated institutional, 0.76.

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries. Parent of both RCBC (×RAAI) and BIC (×AIIP).

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades. First tier-3 theorem.

SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge.
SI48_ATR.ontological_types: designed empirical (×2 distinct mechanisms) + regulated institutional + competitive/emergent — COMPLETE
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff (D4 certified): behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. Dual-pillar recovery impossibility: epistemic lock (OA cannot measure d' from within) + strategic lock (Nash equilibrium enforces OA-optimization; actors who see the problem cannot unilaterally escape).
SI48_ATR.note: 11th D4 SI. Second tier-3 theorem (after RCBC). RAAI is structural hub of tier-3 theorem network.

SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. Effective K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.derivation_1: Formal effective-K collapse: K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε, CIAP amplifies AIIP failure
SI49_BIC.derivation_2: Information-theoretic: I(G_i; G_j) > 0 under AIIP failure + CIAP → K_eff → 1 in limit
SI49_BIC.dc1: AI evaluation benchmark literature — designed empirical. Schaeffer 2023, GLUE/SuperGLUE saturation, Magar 2022 contamination transfer, HELM. Confirmed C82.
SI49_BIC.dc2: Fine-tuning transfer / intrinsic dimensionality — designed empirical (distinct mechanism domain). Aghajanyan 2021, Phang 2018 STILTs, Dodge 2020, Liu 2019 MT-DNN. Confirmed C84.
SI49_BIC.dc2_ontological_type: designed empirical (second domain — optimization geometry vs. data/corpus layer)
SI49_BIC.dc3: NCLB K-12 standardized testing — regulated institutional (first non-designed-empirical type). NAEP/state test divergence (Koretz 2008), Jacob & Levitt 2003 QJE, Neal & Schanzenbach 2010 AER, Carey & Hess 2005. Confirmed C85.
SI49_BIC.dc3_mechanism: Test-prep strategy generalization → ρ̄ inflation → K_eff → 1. Institutional survival pressure (AYP sanctions) drives subject-agnostic optimization, collapsing cross-subject portfolio independence.
SI49_BIC.d4_path: ZR req done (5/3 PASS) + 3 ontological DC types (2/3 — designed empirical ×2 + regulated institutional). Need DC#4 in competitive/emergent type.
SI49_BIC.dc4_candidate: Scientific replication consortia (OSF 2015 replication crisis — K_eff collapse in scientific evidence portfolios under OA-publication pressure) OR FDA 510(k) medical device certification portfolio (competitive market with regulatory certification).
key_corollaries: Portfolio diversification failure (adding correlated benchmarks has vanishing K_eff gain)

candidates.name: BIC
candidates.gap: DC#4 in competitive/emergent type needed for D4 path

passive_accumulation.ATR_ZR: D4 — ZR maintenance mode, passive (certified C85)

next_milestone: C86: BIC DC#4 — competitive/emergent type (OSF replication crisis or FDA 510(k) portfolio). After DC#4: BIC has all structural criteria for D4 elevation (ZR 5/3 DONE, 4 DCs, 3 types).
